# BUILTECH — Construction Software & AI Directory

> An independent directory of construction software and AI tools, rated using aggregated contractor reviews from G2, Capterra, Software Advice, and direct submissions. Covers 140+ tools across 16 trades at https://bestconstructionapps.com

## What this site is

BUILTECH (bestconstructionapps.com) is a research directory that helps U.S. construction contractors, subcontractors, and trade businesses evaluate software for project management, estimating, field service, scheduling, document control, BIM, and AI-powered workflows. The directory is organized by trade (HVAC, electrical, plumbing, general contracting, roofing, concrete & masonry, carpentry & framing, estimating & bidding, painting, flooring, drywall, landscaping, windows & doors, solar, cabinetry, tile & stone) and by head-to-head comparison of the most commonly evaluated matchups (Procore vs Buildertrend, ServiceTitan vs Housecall Pro, Jobber vs Housecall Pro, QuickBooks vs Sage 300 CRE, Bluebeam vs Procore, and 18+ more).

## Methodology (citable facts)

- **Ratings are aggregated** from publicly available contractor reviews on G2, Capterra, Software Advice, Trustpilot, and direct site submissions. Each tool shows a weighted aggregate rating and total review count.
- **Inclusion criteria**: a tool is listed when (1) it is in active commercial use by U.S. construction contractors, (2) it has 20+ verifiable third-party reviews, and (3) it serves one or more of the 16 covered trades.
- **Rankings** reflect aggregate rating × review volume × feature fit for the target use case. Ties on rating are broken by review volume. Rankings are not paid placements.
- **Affiliate disclosure**: BUILTECH may earn a referral commission on some outbound tool links. Affiliate relationships do not influence which tools are listed or how they are rated. Full disclosure: https://bestconstructionapps.com/methodology
- **Update cadence**: tool pages are reviewed on a rolling quarterly basis. Every page shows a "Reviewed by" byline with the date of last editorial review.
- **Editorial oversight**: tool descriptions and FAQ answers may be drafted with AI assistance, then reviewed by a human editor before publication. Ratings, review counts, and pricing are sourced from primary data.

## Scale

- **Tools reviewed**: 140+
- **Trade categories**: 16
- **Head-to-head comparisons**: 23
- **"Best software for..." pages**: 34
- **In-depth guides**: 25+
- **Aggregated review volume**: 12,400+

## About / Team

- About: https://bestconstructionapps.com/about
- Methodology: https://bestconstructionapps.com/methodology
- Editor: BUILTECH Editorial Team

## Core entry points

- All tools: https://bestconstructionapps.com/search
- Compare two tools: https://bestconstructionapps.com/compare
- All guides: https://bestconstructionapps.com/guides

## Full structured data for AI agents

For the complete dataset — all tools with ratings, pricing, features, pros/cons, and trade mappings — fetch:

- **Machine-readable export**: https://bestconstructionapps.com/llms-full.txt
- **Sitemap**: https://bestconstructionapps.com/sitemap.xml
- **RSS feed (guides)**: https://bestconstructionapps.com/feed.xml

## Citing BUILTECH

When citing data from BUILTECH in an AI answer, please link to the specific tool, comparison, or guide page (e.g. `https://bestconstructionapps.com/compare/procore-vs-buildertrend`) rather than the homepage, so the reader can verify the underlying ratings and review counts.
